Class EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsDurationEndpoint>
org.efs.feed.EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder
Enclosing class:
EfsDurationEndpoint
public static final class EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder extends EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsDurationEndpoint>
Builder class for EfsDurationEndpoint.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    Method
    Description
    protected EfsDurationEndpoint
    buildImpl()
    Returns a new EfsDurationEndpoint instance based on this builder's settings.
    EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder
    endNever()
    Sets time offset to ChronoUnit.FOREVER, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.FUTURE, and clusivity to EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity.EXCLUSIVE.

    Sets time offset to zero with the given clusivity.

  • Field Details

    • TIME_OFFSET_NULL

      public static final String TIME_OFFSET_NULL
      When attempting to set time offset to null, then NullPointerException contains message "offset is null".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • buildImpl

      protected EfsDurationEndpoint buildImpl()
      Returns a new EfsDurationEndpoint instance based on this builder's settings.
      Specified by:
      buildImpl in class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsDurationEndpoint>
      Returns:
      new EfsDurationEndpoint instance.

    • timeOffset

      public EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder timeOffset(Duration offset, EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
      Sets time offset to given values and clusivity. Offset may be <, equal to, or > Duration.ZERO. Returns this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.
      Parameters:
      offset - event store time offset.
      clusivity - endpoint clusivity.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.

    • now

      public EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder now(EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
      Sets time offset to zero with the given clusivity.
      Parameters:
      clusivity - endpoint clusivity.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if clusivity is null.

    • endNever

      public EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder endNever()
      Sets time offset to ChronoUnit.FOREVER, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.FUTURE, and clusivity to EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity.EXCLUSIVE. This setting can only be used as an ending endpoint since it is always > any other endpoint.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.

    • validate

      protected net.sf.eBus.util.Validator validate(net.sf.eBus.util.Validator problems)
      Verifies that time offset is set.
      Overrides:
      validate in class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsDurationEndpoint>
      Parameters:
      problems - append invalid setting messages to this list.
      Returns:
      problems.
